license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ygiftue
title: UC Davis - Corticosterone RIA
author: Peter Havel

steps_raw.instruction: Add 0.3 ml diluent to NSB tubes and 0.1 ml to zero tubes.
Add 0.1 ml of calibrators and diluted samples.
Add 0.1 ml of tracer to all tubes.
Add 0.1 ml of antibody to all tubes except Total Count and NSB tubes.
Add precipitating reagent and centrifuge at 3000 rpm at 4°C for 30 min.
Aspirate supernatant without disturbing the pellet.
Count precipitate with gamma counter. Calculate standard curve and unknown values.
